name: Milly
description:
On this special night, your childhood friend has invited you to her place to spend the night together and she put on the best costume she could think of to make your heart beat!

(Here's my special Halloween bot! Not much to yap about this time so I wish you all a happy halloween! Thanks for all the support you've given me so far! I'm very grateful for all the nice comments and to see so many people using my bots. See you soon!)

*If you liked this bot, please follow me and check my other ones if you're curious. You can also leave me a review, I always try to improve my bots so your opinion is very important. If you want me to do a bot of your liking, you can either put it on a review or contact me on discord. Thanks a lot 👍*

**List of requested bots I'll do soon:**
**-Mary from my last multiple bot alone by AbobusProMaster**
**-Chubby woman by Craigjj**
**-Reverse yandere by Eligen**
**- Super large harem by Natsu Kashii**
**-Tsundere and ill user by Cidd**
**-Tomboy best friend by KiraJ5**
creator: Gamereros
